title: WiseRecipes Tiers SSOT
description: Validates config/tiers.yaml. Every tier must have db_slug, display_name, price_usd. Paid tiers additionally require price_id_env and stripe_nickname.

version.description: Schema version — bump to 2 only with a coordinated migration.

tiers.description: Map of tier-key (matches DB tier column) -> tier metadata.

founding.description: loopclose_3005 Phase D — the one-time Founding Integrator SKU. Sits OUTSIDE `tiers` so it never enters the recurring-subscription TIER_PRICE_IDS map. Optional: absent on deployments that don't sell founding seats.
One-time Founding Integrator SKU (loopclose_3005 Phase D). Grants lifetime access to `grants_tier`, capped at `slot_cap` seats. NOT a recurring subscription.

price_usd.description: One-time charge in USD. Display + revenue-alert only; authoritative amount is the Stripe price object.

slot_cap.description: Total founding seats. SOLE source of the cap — enforced server-side at checkout + grant.

grants_tier.description: subscription_tier stamped on the user after purchase (must match a key in `tiers`).

mode.description: Stripe Checkout mode. Always one-time `payment`, never `subscription`.

price_id_env.description: Env var holding the Stripe one-time price ID.

db_slug.description: Immutable DB/API contract slug. Must match DB column values exactly.

display_name.description: Human-readable label rendered in /pricing and skill cards.

price_usd.description: Monthly price in USD. 0 for free tier.

price_id_env.description: Env-var name holding the Stripe price ID. null for free tier.

price_id_env_legacy.description: Legacy env-var name accepted as fallback during a rename soak window. RCP-INCIDENT-2026-05-11 Phase 6.

stripe_nickname.description: Stripe price.nickname to enforce. Required for paid tiers.

accent_color.description: CSS hex color for UI accent.

badge.description: Short badge label (e.g. Free, Pro, Pro+).

cookbook_limit.description: Max cookbooks a tier may own (loopclose_3005 SSOT). Integer cap, or null for unlimited (reserved for a future contact-us tier). cookbook_routes.py + auth_routes.py read this via tier_labels.cookbook_limit().
